summary: Explore See All Pages feature testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests for all explore endpoints with higher limits (trending limit=50, suggested-collectors limit=50, fresh-pressings limit=50, most-wanted limit=100, near-you with collector_limit=50 & listing_limit=30). Frontend: All 5 See All pages load correctly with proper section icons, titles, grids/lists, back navigation links, and protected route behavior.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/explore/trending requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/explore/trending?limit=50 returns up to 50 records with trending_spins
Backend: GET /api/explore/suggested-collectors requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/explore/suggested-collectors?limit=50 returns up to 50 users
Backend: GET /api/explore/fresh-pressings requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/explore/fresh-pressings?limit=50 returns Discogs releases
Backend: GET /api/explore/most-wanted requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/explore/most-wanted?limit=100 returns up to 100 wanted records with want_count
Backend: GET /api/explore/near-you requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/explore/near-you?collector_limit=50&listing_limit=30 accepts new params
Backend: GET /api/explore/near-you without params still works (defaults)
Backend: GET /api/explore/trending/{id}/posts requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/explore/trending/{invalid_id}/posts returns 404
Backend: GET /api/ root endpoint returns welcome message
Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with demo credentials
Frontend: /explore page shows all 5 sections with 'See All' links
Frontend: See All links have correct hrefs (/explore/trending, /explore/taste-match, etc.)
Frontend: /explore/trending page loads with data-testid='see-all-trending'
Frontend: /explore/trending shows grid of trending records with spin counts
Frontend: /explore/trending clicking record opens 'Now Spinning' modal with posts and Wantlist button
Frontend: /explore/taste-match page loads with data-testid='see-all-taste-match'
Frontend: /explore/taste-match shows empty state 'Add more records to your collection to find taste matches.'
Frontend: /explore/fresh-pressings page loads with data-testid='see-all-fresh-pressings'
Frontend: /explore/fresh-pressings shows grid of Discogs releases with hover + wantlist button
Frontend: /explore/most-wanted page loads with data-testid='see-all-most-wanted'
Frontend: /explore/most-wanted shows ranked list with want counts and + buttons
Frontend: /explore/near-you page loads with data-testid='see-all-near-you'
Frontend: /explore/near-you shows empty state 'No collectors found in your area yet. Spread the word!'
Frontend: Each See All page has 'back to explore' link (data-testid='see-all-back') pointing to /explore
Frontend: Each See All page has proper section icon and title
Frontend: Invalid section slug (/explore/invalid-section) shows 'Section not found' message with 'Back to Explore' link
Frontend: See All pages are protected routes - unauthenticated users redirected to /login
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created, used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Explore See All pages are fully functional. Routes: /explore/trending, /explore/taste-match, /explore/fresh-pressings, /explore/most-wanted, /explore/near-you. Each page has: (1) Section icon + title header, (2) 'back to explore' link, (3) Grid/list of items with higher limits than main Explore page. API endpoints accept higher limit params for See All pages. Protected routes redirect to login. The near-you endpoint now accepts collector_limit and listing_limit query params. Taste Match may return empty results for demo user (needs collection overlap). Near You shows empty state since no other users in Atlanta, Georgia area.

routes: /explore/trending - Grid of trending records with spin counts, clickable for modal
/explore/taste-match - Grid of suggested collectors or empty state
/explore/fresh-pressings - Grid of Discogs releases with + wantlist button on hover
/explore/most-wanted - Ranked list with want counts and + wantlist buttons

elements: Section icon (TrendingUp, Users, Disc, Heart, MapPin)
Section title (Trending in the Hive, Taste Match, etc.)

invalid_section_handling.description: Invalid section slug shows 'Section not found.' message with 'Back to Explore' link

protected_routes.description: See All pages require authentication - unauthenticated users redirected to /login
